message:
chore(deps): bump asupersync 0.3.0 → 0.3.1 (crates.io)

- Cargo.toml [workspace.dependencies]: `asupersync = "0.3.0"` → `"0.3.1"`.
  All workspace members consuming via `asupersync = { workspace = true }`
  pick up the bump automatically.
- fuzz/Cargo.toml: direct dep `asupersync = "0.3.0"` → `"0.3.1"`.
- Cargo.lock: refreshed.
